creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173005
ansiweather-1.08.patch

- Update to 1.08
- Move to BSD2CLAUSE and set LICENSE_FILE

Changelog:
	- Use env printf instead of hardcoding printf path
	- Added a $forecast_text variable allowing to customize forecast text
	- Relicensed under the BSD 2-Clause license

portlint: OK
	looks fine.

testport: OK
	poudriere: i386,  10.3 (tested)
	poudriere: amd64, 10.3 (tested)

	poudriere: i386,  9.3  (tested)
	poudriere: amd64, 9.3  (tested)

	poudriere: i386,  11   (tested)
	poudriere: amd64, 11   (tested)
